visuals.title: Digital Signature Creation and Verification Flow
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Digital Signature Creation and Verification Flow
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Cryptographic Primitives</text>

  <!-- Hash Functions -->
  <rect x="50" y="70" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Hash Functions
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Symmetric Encryption -->
  <rect x="170" y="70" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="220" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Symmetric
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Asymmetric Encryption -->
  <rect x="290" y="70" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="340" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Asymmetric
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Digital Signatures -->
  <rect x="110" y="150" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="160" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Digital Signatures
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Key Exchange -->
  <rect x="230" y="150" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="280" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Key Exchange
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- MAC -->
  <rect x="50" y="230" width="100" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="255" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    MAC
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Random Number Gen -->
  <rect x="170" y="230" width="100" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="220" y="255" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Random Numbers
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Crypt. Protocols -->
  <rect x="290" y="230" width="100" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="340" y="255" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Protocols
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Connecting arrows -->
  <line x1="100" y1="110" x2="100" y2="140" stroke="#1976D2" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="220" y1="110" x2="220" y2="140" stroke="#1976D2" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="340" y1="110" x2="340" y2="140" stroke="#1976D2" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="160" y1="190" x2="160" y2="220" stroke="#1976D2" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="280" y1="190" x2="280" y2="220" stroke="#1976D2" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
</svg>

diagrams.title: Digital Signature Creation and Verification Flow
